title: Marketta-class shuttle

{{Quote|We have permission to set down in the primary docking bay at the customs station. Estimated time of arrival is three minutes.|The pilot of the ''Marketta''-class shuttle ''Chandrila Moon''|<ref name="RUIN" />}}
The '''''Marketta''-class shuttle''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] featuring retractable wings and a passenger cabin that could hold at least four individuals. Created during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the shuttle was used by the New Republic's [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]], and one such ''Marketta''-class shuttle, the ''[[Chandrila Moon]]'', carried [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] of the New Republic in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] to meet with representatives of the [[Imperial Remnant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Marketta''-class shuttle was a [[Life support/Legends|life support]]–equipped<ref name="RUIN" /> [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]<ref name="Meerkat" /> that had a narrow passenger cabin with rows of seating and room to accommodate at least four individuals. A [[Viewscreen/Legends|screen]] situated at the front of the cabin allowed the passengers to see where the shuttle was headed. The ''Marketta''-class shuttle also featured retractable wings and [[Engine/Legends|engines]], and had an egress hatch and a [[Entry ramp/Legends|landing ramp]] near the passenger cabin. The shuttle required at least one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to operate.<ref name="RUIN" />

==Role==
The ''Marketta''-class shuttle was mainly used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]].<ref name="Meerkat" />

==History==
The shuttle was created during the early [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Meerkat" /> In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—one ''Marketta''-class shuttle, the ''[[Chandrila Moon]]'',<ref name="RUIN" /> was based on the New Republic [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory-class)|''Protector'']].<ref name="Chandrila">{{CSWECite|I|119|''Chandrila Moon''}}</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], in an effort to improve relations between the New Republic and the [[Imperial Remnant]] in the face of the threat posed by the Yuuzhan Vong, the ''Protector'' ferried [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to the edge of the [[Sartinaynian system]], the location of the Remnant's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. There, the Remnant permitted the New Republic to dispatch a single shuttle, and the ''Chandrila Moon'' carried Organa Solo, her two [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]], and the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Danni Quee]] to the primary [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] of the [[Bastion customs station]] before they went on to meet Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].<ref name="RUIN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Marketta''-class shuttle appeared in [[Michael A. Stackpole]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin|''Dark Tide II: Ruin'']], which was published in [[2000]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="RUIN" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
